command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m "feat: add completion gate flowchart to EXECUTION_GATE.md

Question-based framework that loops until work is provably done:
committed? → pushed? → verified? → memory updated? → handoff-ready?
Every NO loops back. No later. (SE-010-015 prevention)
